title: Mike Wozniak: The Bench
full_description: A story about a bench will be prominent. Previous experience of or strong opinions about benches not required. Let Mike worry about that.
ai_summary: Mike Wozniak — one of the UK's most beloved comedy voices, known for Man Down, Taskmaster, and the cult Three Bean Salad podcast — brings brand new material to Boom Chicago's Comedy Festival. The show is called The Bench. A bench is involved. That's all you need to know.
